context: polyester was synthesised using polycondensation in melt using monomers 2,2′-[ethylenebis(oxy)]bisacetic acid and 4,8-Bis(hydroxymethyl)tricyclo[5.2.1.0 2,6]decane. Resulting polymer is soluble in dichloromethane at a concentration of 40 mg/mL at room temperature. Physical state is fluid. Physical state of the polymer determined by visual observation and polarized microscope analysis. Biodegradable in a clear zone assay using Pseudomonas lemoignei as the microorganism.
